pi_items.source: Task instructions and export_result.sh evaluation script confirm this is the expected target location.
Task instructions and export_result.sh evaluation script confirm this is the expected target location.
Task instructions require 3600 and the ground truth script in export_result.sh evaluates departures between 0 and 3600.

privileged_info_summary: The correct ground truth peak Origin-Destination (OD) edge pair for the first hour (interval 0.0 to 3600.0) in the Bologna Pasubio dataset is Origin '1[0]' to Destination '40[1]' with exactly 1410 trips. The dataset is based on the real-world traffic data from the city of Bologna, therefore it is not synthetic.
